A Curse from Hell.name: A Curse from Hell
A Curse from Hell.description:
Periodic damage dealt now has a 15% chance to reduce the cooldown of Curse of Xoroth by -3 sec.

Chance to trigger is increased by 2% for each stack of Demonfire active.

A Gift from Hell.name: A Gift from Hell
A Gift from Hell.description: Reduces the Rage cost of Infernal Strike, Meatsaw, and Melt by -10.

Absolutism.name: Absolutism
Absolutism.description: Damage dealt by Meatsaw now ignores -10% of the target's Armor.

Ascended Warlock.name: Ascended Warlock
Ascended Warlock.description:
Your Skulltaker used with 6 stacks of Demonfire now reduces the cooldown of Doom by -5 seconds.

In addition, while Doom is active, your Doomguard will now copy your Skulltaker, dealing reduced damage.

Black Shield.name: Black Shield
Black Shield.description: Consume all of your Demon's Blood stacks to create a demonic shield that absorbs 860 damage, increased by 20% per Demon's Blood stack, for 30 seconds.

Black Skull Shield.name: Black Skull Shield
Black Skull Shield.description: Reduces the Rage cost of Shieldgore by -5 and increases its damage by 25%.

Blood Frenzy.name: Blood Frenzy
Blood Frenzy.description: Abilities that spend Demonfire now refund 1 Demonfire when used with at least 4 stacks.

Bloodied Blade.name: Bloodied Blade
Bloodied Blade.description: Melee Physical damage dealt now generates a stack of Demon's Blood.

Bloodrider.name: Bloodrider
Bloodrider.description: Reduces the chance that you will lose your |cffffffffPath of Hellfire|r stacks from taking damage by 25% and increases the duration of |cFFFFFFFFLosing Momentum|r by 50%.

Boiling Blood.name: Boiling Blood
Boiling Blood.description: Casting Suffuse now increases your healing received by 25% for the first 6 seconds of it's duration.

Boundless Fury.name: Boundless Fury
Boundless Fury.description: Increases the effectiveness of the unleash effect from Pestilence of Death by 30%.

Brimstone Bludgeon.name: Brimstone Bludgeon
Brimstone Bludgeon.description:
Transforms your Sever into Brimstone Bludgeon.Brimstone BludgeonGenerates 1 Demonfire
Bludgeon an enemy and all nearby enemies, dealing 250% Weapon Damage.

Unleashes your active Pestilence to trigger a powerful effect.

Scales with modifiers to Sever.

Brimstone Buckler.name: Brimstone Buckler
Brimstone Buckler.description:
Level 10 Passive
Successful blocks now have a 30% chance to summon 1 Hellfire Imp to aid you in battle for 12 seconds. Can only occur once every 3 sec.

Brimstone Flames.name: Brimstone Flames
Brimstone Flames.description:
Damage dealt by Seeking Flame is increased by 20% on enemies affected by Pestilence of Apocalypse.

Damage dealt is increased by an additional 10% for each Demonfire you have active.

Brimstone Knight.name: Brimstone Knight
Brimstone Knight.description: Increases your Fire damage dealt by 3% and dealing Fire damage increases the enemy spell damage taken by 10% for 15 seconds.

Brimstone Splinters.name: Brimstone Splinters
Brimstone Splinters.description:
Grants Seeking Flame a 30% chance to generate 1 additional Demonfire when it deals damage.

Chance to trigger is increased by 5% for each Demonfire you have active.

Brimstone Striker.name: Brimstone Striker
Brimstone Striker.description: Damage dealt by Stoke the Flames now reduces the cooldown of Sever and Juggernaut by -4 sec.

Brimstone's Blood.name: Brimstone's Blood
Brimstone's Blood.description: Increases the chance of gaining a stack of Demon's Blood by 25%.

Bringer of Destruction.name: Bringer of Destruction
Bringer of Destruction.description: Critical damage taken now grants you 1 Demonfire and 5 Rage. Can only occur once every 3 sec.

Brute Strength.name: Brute Strength
Brute Strength.description: Increases your critical damage dealt with Physical attacks by 10% and increases the range of Flesh Hook, Chains of Malice, and Chainwhip by 5 yds.

Bulwark of Xoroth.name: Bulwark of Xoroth
Bulwark of Xoroth.description: Damage dealt by Shieldgore will now apply Torn Flesh, causing the target to bleed for 105 over 15 seconds.

Burning Blade.name: Burning Blade
Burning Blade.description:
Ignite your weapon, causing you to send out searing fire with each melee critical strike, dealing 270 + 32.5% AP Fire damage in a line and increasing your Armor penetration by 30% while active. Lasts for 6 attacks.

Lasts for 1 additional attack per Demonfire consumed.

Burning Power.name: Burning Power
Burning Power.description:
Level 20 Passive
Increases your attack power by 100% of your Intellect and your spell damage by 50% of your Strength.

Burning Rage.name: Burning Rage
Burning Rage.description:
Enrage, generating 15 Rage every 1 sec and making you immune to incapacitate, banish, and polymorph effects for 6 seconds.

Usable while incapacitated, banished, or polymorphed.

Burning Swings.name: Burning Swings
Burning Swings.description: Your Burning Blade now affects 4 additional attacks.

Calamity.name: Calamity
Calamity.description: Increases the damage of the Unleash effect of Pestilence of Apocalypse by 25% and its duration is increased by 5 sec.

Call: Hellfire Abyssal.name: Call: Hellfire Abyssal
Call: Hellfire Abyssal.description:
Call down a Hellfire Abyssal from the sky to crash down upon the targeted 8 yd area, dealing 1500 + 100% SP + 100% AP Fire damage.

The abyssal remains to aid you in battle for 15 seconds and emits an aura that reduces the damage taken by party and raid members within 40 yds by -5%.

Costs -15 less Rage for each active Hellfire Imp.

Call: Hellfire Imp.name: Call: Hellfire Imp
Call: Hellfire Imp.description:
Generates 2 Demonfire
Beckon 1 Hellfire Imp to aid you in battle for 12 seconds and generate 20 Rage.

Threat generated by Hellfire Imps is transferred to you.

Carver.name: Carver
Carver.description:
Level 30 Passive
Critical strikes with Gore now generate 1 additional Demonfire.

Chain Warden.name: Chain Warden
Chain Warden.description: Reduces the cooldown of Chains of Malice by -30 sec, and allows Flesh Hook and Chainwhip to strike up to 2 additional enemies near your primary target.

Chains of Malice.name: Chains of Malice
Chains of Malice.description:
Lock an enemy down with magical chains, stunning them and dragging them with you for 5 seconds.

Every 1 sec, the enemy will suffer 16 Physical damage.

Enemies that cannot be stunned or rooted cannot be dragged.

Chains of Xoroth.name: Chains of Xoroth
Chains of Xoroth.description: Create demonic chains at target location that slow enemies inside by -80% for 5 seconds. At the end of the duration, it pulls all affected enemies to it.

Chainwhip.name: Chainwhip
Chainwhip.description:
Swing a chain at an enemy dealing 38 Physical damage and silencing them for 2 sec, generating a large amount of threat.

If you successfully interrupt an enemy, this will refund 20% of the cooldown.

Chop Shop.name: Chop Shop
Chop Shop.description: Each stack of Demon's Blood now increases the critical strike chance of Sever and Meatsaw by 1%.

Cinderblade.name: Cinderblade
Cinderblade.description:
Level 30 Passive
Increases your critical strike rating by 20% of your Intellect and your spell hit chance by 6%.

Claws of Hell.name: Claws of Hell
Claws of Hell.description: When you spend at least 4 Demonfire stacks you now refresh the duration of your Unleash Apocalypse on the target.

Combusting Blade.name: Combusting Blade
Combusting Blade.description: Increases your Intellect by 5% and reduces the Rage cost of Infernal Strike by -5.

Conqueror's Will.name: Conqueror's Will
Conqueror's Will.description:
Increases the critical strike chance of all party and raid members by 3%. Does not stack with similar effects.

In addition, Physical critical strikes now increase the target's Physical damage taken by 4% for 8 seconds.

Consuming Blade.name: Consuming Blade
Consuming Blade.description: Increases the critical strike chance of Gore by 25% and your expertise by 5.

Crusher.name: Crusher
Crusher.description:
Level 10 Passive
Doubles the base Weapon Damage dealt by Infernal Strike and increases all critical damage dealt by 25%.

Curse of Xoroth.name: Curse of Xoroth
Curse of Xoroth.description:
Curse an enemy for 15 seconds, dealing 1575 + 100% AP Shadowflame Damage over 15 seconds.

Your next Shieldgore within 12 seconds grants you Black Shield, absorbing 860 + 200% Stamina damage for 30 seconds.

Darkrider.name: Darkrider
Darkrider.description: Increases the duration of your Mark spells by 50%.

Decimation.name: Decimation
Decimation.description: Your next Skulltaker or Warbringer is guaranteed to critically strike for 25% increased damage. Lasts 30 seconds.

Demolisher.name: Demolisher
Demolisher.description: Casting Flesh Hook or Chainwhip now taunts the target for 2 seconds and reduces your Physical damage taken by -5% for 10 seconds.

Demon Heart.name: Demon Heart
Demon Heart.description: Embrace your inner demon, instantly generating 6 stacks of Demonfire and 50 Rage.

Demon's Blood.name: Demon's Blood
Demon's Blood.description:
You are a demon.

Damage taken has a 25% chance to generate 3 Rage and grant |cffffffffDemon's Blood|r for 1 min.@s:800999:0@

Demon's Breath.name: Demon's Breath
Demon's Breath.description: Critical strikes with Shieldgore now unleash an eruption of hellfire, causing 111 + 20% AP Fire damage and generating 1 additional Demonfire.

Demonfire Command.name: Demonfire Command
Demonfire Command.description: Reduces the cooldown of Implosion by -10 sec and its Rage cost by -5.

Demonfire Plating.name: Demonfire Plating
Demonfire Plating.description: Reduces your damage taken by -2% and increases your Stamina by 3%.

Demonfire Retaliation.name: Demonfire Retaliation
Demonfire Retaliation.description: Grants you a 30% chance to generate a stack of Demonfire when attacked.

Demonic Blade.name: Demonic Blade
Demonic Blade.description:
Damaging abilities that spend Demonfire now increase the damage and cost of your next 2 Gores by 25% for 12 seconds.

At the end of the duration, or when all stacks are consumed, you instantly cast Meatsaw free of cost.

Demonic Bulwark.name: Demonic Bulwark
Demonic Bulwark.description:
Level 50 Passive
Your successful blocks now have a 30% chance to critically block for twice the normal amount.

Chance to trigger is increased by 2% for each Hellfire Imp you have active.

Demonic Frenzy.name: Demonic Frenzy
Demonic Frenzy.description:
Casting Sever now increases your attack speed by 20% for 10 seconds.

Casting Gore extends the duration of this effect by 3 sec.

Demonic Grit.name: Demonic Grit
Demonic Grit.description: Grant your summons demonic grit, increasing their total health by 15% and reducing their damage taken by by 10%.

Demonic Power.name: Demonic Power
Demonic Power.description: Your inner demon radiates from within, increasing your threat generated by 100%.

Demonic Rage.name: Demonic Rage
Demonic Rage.description: Generating Demon's Blood stacks now generates 1 additional Rage.

Demonskin.name: Demonskin
Demonskin.description: Each stack of Demon's Blood also increases your Armor by 1%.

Dismemberment.name: Dismemberment
Dismemberment.description: Damaging abilities that spend Demonfire now reduces the target's healing received by -20% for 8 seconds.

Domination.name: Domination
Domination.description: Melee critical strikes now reduce the cooldown of Searing Blade by -1 sec.

Doom.name: Doom
Doom.description:
Transforms your Greater Imp into a Doomguard for 12 seconds.

While transformed, your Doomguard deals 20% more damage, and its auto attacks ignite the target, dealing 10% of the damage dealt as Fire damage over 6 seconds, stacking 6 times.

Drag Through Hell.name: Drag Through Hell
Drag Through Hell.description: Summons a friendly party or raid member to your location from anywhere in the world.

Dreadrider's Stomp.name: Dreadrider's Stomp
Dreadrider's Stomp.description:
Command your steed to stomp, dealing 115 Flamestrike Damage to nearby enemies.

Damage increased by 25% for each stack of |cffffffffPath of Hellfire|r you have.

Dreadsteed Portal.name: Dreadsteed Portal
Dreadsteed Portal.description:
Summon a |cFFFFFFFFDreadsteed Portal|r for 1 min. 

Allies can interact with the portal to mount a |cFFFFFFFFDreadsteed|r.

Evil Duo.name: Evil Duo
Evil Duo.description:
Level 50 Passive
Unleashing a Pestilence now causes your Greater Imp to unleash it's Pestilence.

The Imp's unleash effect is equivalent to your own unleash effect for the equivalent Pestilence.

Fiend.name: Fiend
Fiend.description: Casting Sever now removes the cost of your next Infernal Strike.

Fiend of Forges.name: Fiend of Forges
Fiend of Forges.description: Forgefiend's Bulwark now also increases your critical strike chance by 10%.

Fiery Retribution.name: Fiery Retribution
Fiery Retribution.description: Each time a Hellfire Imp dies, you reduce the cooldown of Sacrificial Circle by -2 sec and Implosion by -1 sec.

Flames of Xoroth.name: Flames of Xoroth

Flamewrath.name: Flamewrath
Flamewrath.description: Increases the critical strike chance of Seeking Flame by 20%.

Flay Corpse.name: Flay Corpse
Flay Corpse.description:
Consume the target corpse, generating 20 Rage and then healing you and your summons for 4% maximum health every 1 sec for 5 sec.

Once a corpse has been flayed, it cannot be flayed again. 

Cannot be used in combat. Only usable on Humanoids, Beasts, or Demons.

Flesh Hook.name: Flesh Hook
Flesh Hook.description: Hook an enemy, pulling them to you, dealing 27 Physical damage and generating 10 Rage.

Forgefiend's Bulwark.name: Forgefiend's Bulwark
Forgefiend's Bulwark.description: Successful blocks, parries and dodges now have a 30% chance to Enrage you, increasing your damage dealt by 10% for 10 seconds.

Fury of Xoroth.name: Fury of Xoroth
Fury of Xoroth.description:
Infernal Strike now grants you a stack of Xorothian Fury, increasing the chance for your next Skulltaker within 10 seconds to critically strike by 10% per stack, up to 3 stacks.

Additionally, using Skulltaker with 6 stacks of Demonfire grants you Xorothian Rage, causing your next Infernal Strike within 10 seconds to be guaranteed to critically strike.

Gore.name: Gore
Gore.description:
|cffffffff2 Charges, 8 sec recharge|r
|cffff9933Generates 1 Demonfire|r
Quickly gore an enemy, dealing 100% Weapon Damage plus 30.

Gored.name: Gored
Gored.description: Damage dealt by Gore and Meatsaw now increases your target's damage taken from Skulltaker and Warbringer by 15% for 10 seconds, stacking 2 times.

Gorged.name: Gorged
Gorged.description:
Gore now heals you for 50% of the damage dealt over 3 sec and grants a stack of Gorged for 30 seconds.

At 3 stacks, your next Sever will consume the stacks to leech an additional 200% of the damage dealt by it from up to 5 enemies within 5 yds.

In addition, Sever now strikes an additional time after 1 sec but has a 2 increased cooldown.

Greater Imp.name: Greater Imp
Greater Imp.description:
Level 10 Passive
Teaches you Summon: Greater Imp and increases your expertise by 10.
Summon: Greater ImpSummon a Greater Imp to aid you in combat.

Greater Imp has various combat abilities that provide excellent single target damage and control.

Greater Mark of Blaumeux.name: Greater Mark of Blaumeux
Greater Mark of Blaumeux.description: Mark an ally with the power of Blaumeux, increasing their spell power by 62.

Greater Mark of Korth’azz.name: Greater Mark of Korth’azz
Greater Mark of Korth’azz.description: Strength increased by 77. Fire Resistance increased by 60.

Greater Mark of Rivendare.name: Greater Mark of Rivendare
Greater Mark of Rivendare.description: Mark nearby party and raid members with the guile of Rivendare increasing their Stamina by 54 and Frost Resistance by 60 for 30 min.

Greater Mark of Zeliek.name: Greater Mark of Zeliek
Greater Mark of Zeliek.description: Empowers nearby party and raid members with the mark of Zeliek, reducing their resource costs by 5% and increasing their Arcane Resistance by 60. Lasts 30 min.

Grotesque.name: Grotesque
Grotesque.description: While Hellfire Form is active, your Seeking Flame now has no cooldown and generates an additional Demonfire.

Hand of Doom.name: Hand of Doom
Hand of Doom.description: Increases the Weapon Damage dealt by Sever by 10%, increased by 10% for each Demonfire you have active.

Harbinger of Pestilence.name: Harbinger of Pestilence
Harbinger of Pestilence.description: Increases the effectiveness of your Pestilences by 50%.

Heart of Xoroth.name: Heart of Xoroth
Heart of Xoroth.description: Allows Demon's Blood to stack 5 additional times.

Hell Blender.name: Hell Blender
Hell Blender.description: Casting Meatsaw now has a 40% chance to refund 10 Rage.

Hell's Forge.name: Hell's Forge
Hell's Forge.description: Create a |cffffffffBlacksmithing Forge|r and an |cffffffffAnvil|r at your location for 2 min.

Hellborn.name: Hellborn
Hellborn.description: Generating a stack of Demon's Blood now has a 5% chance to unleash your active Pestilence at half of their effectiveness.

Hellbound Charge.name: Hellbound Charge
Hellbound Charge.description:
2 Charges, 60 sec recharge
Briefly jump atop your Xorothian Warsteed, increasing your movement speed by 70% for 3 seconds.

Usable while indoors, but you cannot use your Mounted Combat abilities while riding your Warsteed in this way.

Hellbound Leash.name: Hellbound Leash
Hellbound Leash.description:
Bind an enemy Demon up to level 42, forcing it to do your bidding for 5 min (8 sec vs players).

While active, 20% of all damage it takes is redirected to you.

Hellbreaker.name: Hellbreaker
Hellbreaker.description: Casting Unleash Pestilence now removes all active movement impairing effects from you.

Hellbringer.name: Hellbringer
Hellbringer.description:
Increases the all damage dealt by party and raid members by 3%.

Does not stack with similar effects.

Hellfire Advance.name: Hellfire Advance
Hellfire Advance.description:
Your |cFFFFFFFFWarsteed|r launches forward 30 yds. Distance scales with |cffffffffPath of Hellfire|r stacks.

Cannot be used in combat.

Hellfire Bellows.name: Hellfire Bellows
Hellfire Bellows.description:
Transforms your Flames of Xoroth into Hellfire Bellows.Hellfire BellowsBellow fire on all enemies in a 6 yd cone in front of and behind you, dealing 252 + 17.63% AP + 40% fire SP Fire damage and reducing the cooldown of Chains of Xoroth by 0 to 0 sec per enemy hit.

Cooldown is reduced by -3 sec for each Demonfire consumed.

Hellfire Embers.name: Hellfire Embers
Hellfire Embers.description: Increases the Fire damage dealt by your Hellfire Imp by 30% against enemies above 80% maximum health.

Hellfire Form.name: Hellfire Form
Hellfire Form.description: Enter your Hellfire Form, increasing your Fire damage dealt by 20% and Fire critical strike chance by 15% for 15 seconds.

Hellfire Reprimand.name: Hellfire Reprimand
Hellfire Reprimand.description: Your Hellfire Imps now have a 20% chance on hit to launch a firebolt dealing 40% Strength Fire damage and reducing enemy attack power by 190 for 10 seconds.

Hellfire Resolve.name: Hellfire Resolve
Hellfire Resolve.description:
Level 30 Passive
Increases your block rating by 15% of your Strength and increases your hit rating by 5% of your Strength.

Hellfire Rituals.name: Hellfire Rituals
Hellfire Rituals.description: Critical strikes with Skulltaker now increases the haste of your Greater Imp by 15% for 8 seconds.

Hellfire Sieger.name: Hellfire Sieger
Hellfire Sieger.description: Doubles the absorption of Black Shield while below 35% health.

Hellfire Stirrups.name: Hellfire Stirrups
Hellfire Stirrups.description:
Increases the mount speed of |cffffffffXorothian Warsteed|r by 75% for 5 sec.

While active, you cannot lose your |cffffffffPath of Hellfire|r stacks.

Cannot be used in combat.

Hellfire Striker.name: Hellfire Striker
Hellfire Striker.description: Increases your critical strike and hit chance by 3%.

Hellfire Trample.name: Hellfire Trample
Hellfire Trample.description:
Your |cFFFFFFFFWarsteed|r surges forward 25 yds and deals 70 Fire damage to enemies in your path.

Gains 25% increased damage for every stack of |cffffffffPath of Hellfire|r you have.

Hellish Rebuke.name: Hellish Rebuke
Hellish Rebuke.description: Generating a stack of Demon's Blood now has a 15% chance to trigger a fiery explosion on up to 5 nearby enemies, dealing 96 Fire damage.

Hellknight.name: Hellknight
Hellknight.description: While above 75% health, all direct Physical damage dealt will grant a stack of Hellknight.HellknightMovement speed increased and global cooldowns reduced by -5%. Physical Damage and critical strike chance increased by 1%, stacking 5 times. Lasts 20 seconds.

Hellmaw.name: Hellmaw
Hellmaw.description:
Burn an enemy with a fiery strike, dealing 34 Shadowflame Damage, plus an additional 128 over 12 sec.

Deals 20% increased damage per |cffff9933Demonfire|r consumed.

Hellrider.name: Hellrider
Hellrider.description:
Increases your melee haste, movement speed, and mounted movement speed by 10% for 10 sec.

Duration and effectiveness increased by 20% per |cffff9933Demonfire|r consumed.

Usable while mounted.

Hellsmelted.name: Hellsmelted
Hellsmelted.description: Increases the critical strike chance and damage of Burning Blade by 30%.

Hellsmelted Armor.name: Hellsmelted Armor
Hellsmelted Armor.description: Each Hellfire Imp active now increases your chance to block by 1%.

Hellstorm.name: Hellstorm
Hellstorm.description:
Create a hellstorm, dealing 77 + 32.04% fire SP + 8% AP Fire damage to up to 8 nearby enemies.

Embers then flare every 1 sec for 2 seconds, dealing 28 + 2.5% fire SP + 2.5% AP Fire damage.

Duration is increased by 100% for each stack of Demonfire consumed.

Hellstriker.name: Hellstriker
Hellstriker.description: Direct critical strikes now increase the duration of Hellrider on you by 2 sec.

Hellwrath.name: Hellwrath
Hellwrath.description: Your Demon's Blood can now stack 5 additional times and each stack now increases the absorption amount of Black Shield by 1%.

Hook, Line, and Sinker.name: Hook, Line, and Sinker
Hook, Line, and Sinker.description: Reduces the cooldown of Flesh Hook and Chainwhip by -5 sec.

Imp Aura.name: Imp Aura
Imp Aura.description:
Level 40 Passive
Each Hellfire Imp now reduces your Magic damage taken by 1%.

Imp Gang Boss.name: Imp Gang Boss
Imp Gang Boss.description: Your Call: Hellfire Imp now summons 2 additional imps.

Imp Guards.name: Imp Guards
Imp Guards.description:
Level 20 Passive
Each Hellfire Imp now reduces your Physical damage taken by 1%.

Impcaller.name: Impcaller
Impcaller.description:
Transforms your Call: Hellfire Imp into Impcaller.Impcaller (Aura)Your Infernal Strike now summons a Hellfire Imp to aid you in combat for 10 seconds, but its Rage cost is increased by 10.

In addition, the maximum health of your imps is increased by 30%.

Implosion.name: Implosion
Implosion.description:
Explode with hellish fire, dealing 51 + 25% Strength + 50% fire SP + 10% AP Fire damage to nearby enemies, beckoning Hellfire Imps to aid you in battle for 12 seconds, and generating 30 Rage.

Deals increased damage and increases the amount of imps summoned by 1 for each Demonfire consumed.

Imprison.name: Imprison
Imprison.description:
Imprison a Demon for 30 sec (6 sec vs players), banishing them, preventing all action, and making them invulnerable to all spells and attacks.

Can only affect 1 enemy at a time.

Indiscriminate.name: Indiscriminate
Indiscriminate.description: Seeking Flame now spreads Hellmaw and Melt from the target to up to 3 enemies within 6 yds.

Infernal Bulwark.name: Infernal Bulwark
Infernal Bulwark.description: Casting Unleash Pestilence now generates 4 stacks of Demonfire and grants Infernal Bulwark.Infernal Bulwark (Proc)Increases block value by 20% for 18 seconds.

Infernal Pummeling.name: Infernal Pummeling
Infernal Pummeling.description: Melt now increases the damage your target takes from Flames of Xoroth and Skulltaker by 10%.

Infernal Pursuit.name: Infernal Pursuit
Infernal Pursuit.description: Increases your melee haste by 3% and reduces the duration of root effects against you by -15%.

Infernal Steel.name: Infernal Steel
Infernal Steel.description: Casting Skulltaker with 6 Demonfire stacks now causes your next Hellmaw within 15 seconds to tick -25% faster and cost -50% less Rage.

Infernal Strike.name: Infernal Strike
Infernal Strike.description:
|cffff9933Generates 2 Demonfire|r
Strike an enemy for 55% Weapon Damage plus 17 as Fire damage.

Inferno Blast.name: Inferno Blast
Inferno Blast.description: Increases your critical damage against Burning targets by 20%.

Into the Maw.name: Into the Maw
Into the Maw.description: Hellmaw causes a Hellfire Explosion at the end of its duration, dealing additional Fire damage to all nearby enemies within 5 yards equal to 50% of the periodic damage dealt over the duration.

Invasion.name: Invasion
Invasion.description: All Fire damage dealt is increased by 10% to enemies above 80% health.

Jagged Edge.name: Jagged Edge
Jagged Edge.description: Increases your Rage generated from damage dealt by 20%.

Juggernaut.name: Juggernaut
Juggernaut.description:
Consume all of your Demon's Blood to become a juggernaut, reducing all damage taken by -30% for 10 seconds. 

For the duration, you heal every 3 sec for 6 + 10% AP, increased per Demon's Blood stack consumed.

Knight of Pestilence.name: Knight of Pestilence
Knight of Pestilence.description: Increases the critical damage of your Pestilences by 50%.

Knight of the Apocalypse.name: Knight of the Apocalypse
Knight of the Apocalypse.description:
Level 50 Passive
Unleash Pestilence now triggers no cooldown on it's first use.

Unleash Pestilence can only be reset this way once every 30 sec.

Legion's Presence.name: Legion's Presence
Legion's Presence.description:
Emanate an aura to allies within 25 yds for 15 seconds, increasing their damage dealt by 10%.

Fire damage dealt by Hellfire Imps is increased by 150% and total health increased by 50% while this effect is active on them.

Mark of Blaumeux.name: Mark of Blaumeux
Mark of Blaumeux.description: Mark an ally with the power of Blaumeux, increasing their spell power by 25 and Shadow Resist by 15 for 30 min.

Mark of Korth’azz.name: Mark of Korth’azz
Mark of Korth’azz.description: Mark an ally with the power of Korth’azz, increasing Strength by 3 and Fire Resistance by 5 for 30 min.

Mark of Rivendare.name: Mark of Rivendare
Mark of Rivendare.description: Mark an ally with the guile of Rivendare increasing their Stamina by 32 and Frost Resistance by 25 for 30 min.

Mark of Zeliek.name: Mark of Zeliek
Mark of Zeliek.description: Empower an ally with the mark of Zeliek, reducing their resource costs by 5% and increasing their Arcane Resistance by 60. Lasts 30 min.

Meatsaw.name: Meatsaw
Meatsaw.description:
|cffff9933Generates 2 Demonfire|r
Quickly swing a massive blade at up to 5 nearby enemies, dealing 50% Weapon Damage plus 8.

Melt.name: Melt
Melt.description: Incinerate an enemy with hellish flames, reducing their Armor by 4% per |cffff9933Demonfire|r consumed for 24 sec.

Mounted Champion.name: Mounted Champion
Mounted Champion.description: Your Xorothian Warsteed is now instant cast and prevents roots and slows for 2 sec when cast, but now has a 10 sec cooldown.

Mounted Reaver.name: Mounted Reaver
Mounted Reaver.description: Reduces the cooldown of all Mounted Combat abilities by -20%.

Murderous Might.name: Murderous Might
Murderous Might.description: Increases the damage of abilities that spend Demonfire by 25%.

Mutilation.name: Mutilation
Mutilation.description: Increases the damage of Gore and Sever by 10%.

Omen of Rage.name: Omen of Rage
Omen of Rage.description: Periodic damage and healing done has a 10% chance to grant a stack of Demonfire.

Partners in Flames.name: Partners in Flames
Partners in Flames.description: Fire damage dealt by your Greater Imp now has a 25% chance to empower you, increasing your damage dealt by 5% for 10 seconds.

Pestilence Unbound.name: Pestilence Unbound
Pestilence Unbound.description: When you use an ability that consumes Demonfire with 6 stacks, you now unleash your active Pestilence at half of their effectiveness.

Pestilence of Apocalypse.name: Pestilence of Apocalypse
Pestilence of Apocalypse.description: Emanate the Pestilence of Apocalypse, causing targets within 8 yds to take 10% increased Fire damage from you.

Pestilence of Conquest.name: Pestilence of Conquest
Pestilence of Conquest.description: Emanate a pestilence, slowing the casting speed of all enemies within 12 yds by 10%.

Pestilence of Death.name: Pestilence of Death
Pestilence of Death.description: Emanate a pestilence, increasing your critical damage by 10%.

Pestilence of Famine.name: Pestilence of Famine
Pestilence of Famine.description: Emanate a pestilence reducing the movement speed by 25% and attack speed of nearby enemies by 10%.

Pestilence of War.name: Pestilence of War
Pestilence of War.description: Emanate a pestilence, causing each |cffff9933Demonfire|r spent to heal for 1% of your maximum health.

Pestilent Retaliation.name: Pestilent Retaliation
Pestilent Retaliation.description:
When you block an attack you now have a 5% chance to unleash your active Pestilence at half of its effectiveness.

Can only occur once every 5 sec.

Punisher.name: Punisher
Punisher.description: Increases the attack power and spell power scaling of Seeking Flame by 25%.

Rage of Xoroth.name: Rage of Xoroth
Rage of Xoroth.description: Your critical strikes now enrage you, increasing your melee attack speed by 15%.

Ragefist.name: Ragefist
Ragefist.description: Increases your maximum Rage by 10 and reduces the duration of disarm effects against you by -15%.

Rain of Chaos.name: Rain of Chaos
Rain of Chaos.description: Casting Flames of Xoroth with 6 Demonfire now calls down a Rain of Chaos.Rain of ChaosMolten rain burns enemies in the area causing 234 Fire Damage over 9 seconds.

Render.name: Render
Render.description:
Level 40 Passive
Increases your melee haste rating by 30% of your Strength.

Ripper.name: Ripper
Ripper.description:
Level 20 Passive
Damaging abilities that spend Demonfire now refresh a charge of Gore.

Sacrificial Circle.name: Sacrificial Circle
Sacrificial Circle.description:
Sacrifice your Hellfire Imps within 15 yds, healing you 15% of your maximum health, plus an additional amount equal to 25% of each of your Hellfire Imp's maximum health.

Hellfire Imps sacrificed in this way leave behind corpses.

Screamin' Demon.name: Screamin' Demon
Screamin' Demon.description: Reduces the cooldown of Unleash Pestilence by -15 sec.

Seeking Flame.name: Seeking Flame
Seeking Flame.description:
|cffff9933Generates 1 Demonfire|r
Sear an enemy, dealing 130 Fire damage.

Seething Strikes.name: Seething Strikes
Seething Strikes.description: Increases the damage of Sever by 30% against Burning targets and it now increases the targets chance to be critically struck by 3% for 12 seconds.

Sever.name: Sever
Sever.description: Strike an enemy with demonic might, dealing 100% Weapon Damage plus 11 and generating 20 Rage.

Shadowflame Forge.name: Shadowflame Forge
Shadowflame Forge.description: Increases the duration of Hellmaw by 3 sec.

Shieldgore.name: Shieldgore
Shieldgore.description:
|cffff9933Generates 2 Demonfire|r
Gore the target with your spiked shield, causing 44 High Threat Fire Damage, scaling with your block value.

Skulltaker.name: Skulltaker
Skulltaker.description:
Slash an enemy viciously, dealing 70% Weapon Damage plus 10.

Deals increased damage per |cffff9933Demonfire|r consumed.

Snarl.name: Snarl
Snarl.description: Taunts an enemy target to attack you.

Soul Furnace.name: Soul Furnace
Soul Furnace.description: Sacrificial Circle now grants you a damage absorption shield equal to 15% of the total health of each destroyed imp for 10 sec.

Speed Demon.name: Speed Demon
Speed Demon.description: Your Suffuse now increases your movement speed by 20%.

Spiked Chains.name: Spiked Chains
Spiked Chains.description: Your Chainwhip now deals 321 + 30% AP additional Physical damage, increased by 100% on Humanoids.

Stoke the Flames.name: Stoke the Flames
Stoke the Flames.description:
Your Skulltaker and Melt used with 6 Demonfire now refund 2 Demonfire.

Skulltaker used with 6 Demonfire now deals an additional 30% Fire damage.

Suffuse.name: Suffuse
Suffuse.description:
Embrace your mortal body, restoring 103 + 10% Stamina health every 3 sec, scaling with Stamina and defense rating.

Lasts 3 sec for each Demonfire consumed.

Suffusion of Essence.name: Suffusion of Essence
Suffusion of Essence.description: Increases the duration of Suffuse by 2 sec for each Demonfire consumed.

Taskmaster.name: Taskmaster
Taskmaster.description: Increases your critical strike chance by 3% plus an additional 15% against Demons.

The Butcher.name: The Butcher
The Butcher.description: Damage dealt by Meatsaw now increases the damage dealt by subsequent Meatsaws by 10% and reduces its global cooldown by -5% for 10 seconds, stacking 5 times.

To Ashes.name: To Ashes
To Ashes.description: Increases the critical strike chance of abilities that spend Demonfire by 5%.

Unbound Inferno.name: Unbound Inferno
Unbound Inferno.description: Your Infernal Strikes against enemies affected by your Flames of Xoroth now blasts nearby enemies for 75 + 10% fire SP + 5% AP Fire damage.

Unleash Pestilence.name: Unleash Pestilence
Unleash Pestilence.description: Let out a terrifying howl, unleashing your active |cffffffffPestilence|r on nearby enemies to trigger a powerful effect.

War Pig.name: War Pig
War Pig.description: Increases your Physical damage dealt by 4%.

Warbringer.name: Warbringer
Warbringer.description:
Slam the ground, dealing 65% Weapon Damage plus 12 to nearby enemies, reducing the effectiveness of any healing by 50% for 10 sec.

Deals increased damage per |cffff9933Demonfire|r consumed.

Warden of Hellfire.name: Warden of Hellfire
Warden of Hellfire.description: Increases the damage dealt by Skulltaker and Flames of Xoroth by 20%.

Warpath.name: Warpath
Warpath.description: While Unleash Pestilence is active it now protects your movement speed from being reduced below 90% of normal speed.

Xorothian Empowerment.name: Xorothian Empowerment
Xorothian Empowerment.description: Increases the attack power of all party and raid members 5%. Does not stack with similar effects.

Xorothian Finesse.name: Xorothian Finesse
Xorothian Finesse.description: Increases your chance to parry by 5%.

Xorothian Sigil.name: Xorothian Sigil
Xorothian Sigil.description: Create a demonic sigil that protects party members within 20 yds of you, causing them to deflect the next harmful spell cast against them within 3 seconds.

Xorothian Warsteed.name: Xorothian Warsteed
Xorothian Warsteed.description:
Mount your |cFFFFFFFFXorothian Warsteed|r, increasing movement speed by 20%.

Generate |cffffffffPath of Hellfire|r if you haven't dealt or taken damage for 3 sec, stacking up to 2 times. This increases to 3 times at level 30 and 5 times at level 40.

Can be used in combat and is castable while moving.
@s:804787:0@
